title: Better Combat NBT fix
description: Fixed NBT compat for multiplayer in BC
body:
Just fixes nbt compat in multiplayer, implemented like shown in this [pull request](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr/BetterCombat/pull/324)  
It fixes NBT Compat not working in Multiplayer, this is required for Modular Item mods like Truly Modular.  
This issue [https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr/BetterCombat/issues/141](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr/BetterCombat/issues/141) is fixed by this
